productDisplayName: Nike Men's Flyclave Red White Shoe
description: Based on the rare nike Grass Court tennis shoe, the Flycave features lightweight mesh uppers and a sleek low profile sole. Contrast laces fused with Swoosh logos at the sides makes the footwear a great cmpanion on and off the track.Upper Leather, suede and mesh upper for robust structure Suede toe cap, sidelays and overlay on heel cup for stylish look Mesh toe box along with side panelling and lining for breathability Lightly padded mesh tongue for snug Fit Central contrast lacing for customised fit nike swoosh embroidered on the tongue and printed on the side panel Midsole Soft cushioned footbed for all day step-in comfort Removable sockliner to replace with an orthotic Outsole Outsole in durable rubber in herringbone pattern  for great grip on all surfaces Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
